patient_summary: Olivia, a 73-year-old female, has documented dyslipidemia (Mixed dyslipidemia - Primary and Hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus), essential hypertension, and a history of anemia (Postoperative anemia; Unspecified anemia). Major planned procedure: COLONOSCOPY, WITH BIOPSY on 02/21/2025 with Haroon, Mustafa, MD. Key recent labs (07/03/2023) include Ferritin 266.8 (H) ng/mL, Iron 41 (L) ug/dL, eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L) ml/min/1.73m2, Triglycerides 158 (H) mg/dL, LDL Calculated 62 mg/dL. Functional assessments note difficulty walking (06/14/2023) and mixed assistance needs for activities of daily living in earlier assessments. Multiple care team members are listed including Hand, Hoyet A, MD (PCP) and several consultants. Conflicts documented include differing legal sex entries and inconsistent smoking history across sources.
